ddls:
CREATE TABLE "inventory_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product associated with the item */,
  "base_price" REAL /* Base price of the item */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Sale price of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity in stock */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the item */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Reorder point for the item */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "product_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier company */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the supplier */,
  "supplier_type" TEXT /* Type of supplier */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supplier_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier associated with the contact */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the contact */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplier_contacts_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase order */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being ordered */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date of the order */,
  "quantity_ordered" INTEGER /* Quantity ordered */,
  "order_price" REAL /* Total price of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Shipping date of the order */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES inventory_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_levels" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory item */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the stock level is recorded */,
  "stock_date" TEXT /* Date of the stock level record */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in stock on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_levels_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_levels_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES inventory_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouse_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the staff member is assigned */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warehouse_staff_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_warehouse" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the inventory record in the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the item is stored */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in the warehouse */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Storage conditions for the item in the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES inventory_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_audit" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the audit record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory item being audited */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the audit */,
  "quantity_checked" INTEGER /* Quantity checked during the audit */,
  "variance" INTEGER /* Difference between recorded quantity and audited quantity */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_audit_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES inventory_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the transaction */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory item involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "quantity_changed" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item added or removed */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., addition, removal) */,
  "transaction_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_transactions_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES inventory_items ("item_id")
)
